sections.title: On-Device AI
sections.text: Khione runs entirely on your device. All processing happens directly on your iPhone — without cloud services, external servers, or data sharing. This keeps everything private, fast, and reliable, even without an internet connection.

sections.title: Fully Native & Powerful
sections.text: Khione is built entirely with Swift and SwiftUI and is deeply optimized for iOS. Modern Apple frameworks, system themes, and native technologies provide a smooth, responsive, and energy-efficient experience.

sections.title: Siri & System Integration
sections.text: Khione can be opened directly through Siri and Spotlight. This makes the AI instantly accessible and seamlessly integrated into iOS — fast, simple, and always within reach.

sections.title: Privacy & Accessibility
sections.text: Privacy, accessibility, and ease of use are at the core of Khione. The app supports voice interaction and was intentionally designed to be clear and minimal. Khione helps people with different needs and continues to evolve to make interaction even easier and more accessible.
